_notes: All entries are sanctoral calendar feast titles (no scripture); 0 verses fetched. Saint names rendered ecumenically/transliterated. Some obscure saints lack established CUV/Catholic Chinese forms and were transliterated, flagged here: Abdon/Sennen=阿布东/森南, Afra=阿弗拉, Agapitus=亚加比, Agatho=亚加通, Altmann=阿尔特曼, Anacletus=亚那克勒, Antherus=安特罗, Batho=巴托, Castulus=卡斯图禄, Conrad of Parzham=孔拉德, Cunegunda=库内贡达, Deusdedit=德乌斯德狄, Emygdius=厄米第, Eutychianus=欧迪基盎, Evaristus=艾华理. Used CUV bible names where applicable (Anna=亚拿, Andrew=安得烈, Bartholomew=巴多罗买, Barnabas=巴拿巴, Elizabeth=伊利莎白, Dionysius/Denis=丢尼修). Papal/Catholic-saint names use Catholic forms (若亚敬=Joachim, 类思·公撒格=Aloysius Gonzaga, 文德=Bonaventure, 道明=Dominic, 嘉禄=Charles Borromeo, 则济利亚=Cecilia, 雅妮=Agnes, 老楞佐=Lawrence, 加大利纳=Catherine, 佳兰=Clare, 比利日大=Bridget). Three modern-calendar entries given in English in source (尹龙/金大建/赵荣 Vietnamese/Korean/Chinese martyrs, Magallanes) rendered per common Catholic Chinese. 'O. N.'=Ordinis Nostri=本会 (of our Order). Assumptio rendered 荣召升天. 'Doctoris Ecclesiæ'=教会圣师 per glossary. Antonii Mariæ Zaccaria: Zaccaria here is surname of the saint (founder), rendered 撒迦利亚 matching CUV though it is a surname.
